title: GovernanceStateProjection Contract
description: Pinned shape of the read-only governance state projection exposed to adapters. SSOT remains SessionState in FlowGuard core; this is a derived view.

haltReason.description: Reason the session is halted (null if not halted).

enforcementActive.description: Whether governance enforcement is currently active.

resumable.description: Whether the session can be resumed.

code.description: Blocking reason code (present when status is 'blocked').

riskGate.description: Risk gate state (null when no gate is active).
